mapper.sql: MEMBER_NUM, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_ADDR, MEMBER_ADDR_DETAIL, MEMBER_POST, MEMBER_REGIST, GENDER, MEMBER_PHONE1, MEMBER_PHONE2, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_BIRTH, MEMBER_POINT, MEMBER_EMAIL_CONF
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members
NVL(MEMBER_STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
AND (LOWER(MEMBER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%' OR LOWER(MEMBER_ID) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchWord}) || '%')
SELECT FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND NVL(member_status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET MEMBER_NAME = #{memberName}, MEMBER_ADDR = #{memberAddr}, MEMBER_ADDR_DETAIL = #{memberAddrDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_POST = #{memberPost}, MEMBER_PHONE1 = #{memberPhone1}, MEMBER_PHONE2 = #{memberPhone2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}, MEMBER_BIRTH = #{memberBirth}, GENDER = #{gender} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND NVL(MEMBER_STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE members SET member_status = 'WITHDRAWN', member_withdrawn_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, member_name = '탈퇴회원', member_id = #{withdrawnMemberId}, member_addr = NULL, member_addr_detail = NULL, member_post = NULL, gender = NULL, member_phone1 = NULL, member_phone2 = NULL, member_email = NULL, member_birth = NULL, member_email_conf = 'N' WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND NVL(member_status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT member_num FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND NVL(member_status, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT FROM MEMBERS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND NVL(MEMBER_STATUS, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
